creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hmm, activation of non-default option DNSTAP does indeed lead to a build failures (and not just on 9.3, it happens on 10.X as well), but AFAICT it is because `kdig_CPPFLAGS += $(DNSTAP_CFLAGS)' line is missing from `src/Makefile.am' file (and thus pre-generated `src/Makefile.in') which should contain "$libfstrm_CFLAGS $libprotobuf_c_CFLAGS" set by configure script.

I've provided it explicitly in ports r399986 for the time being, as patching those files would result in higher line count.  Ideally this bug should be fixed upstream.
